ops.text: gh run list --commit <sha> returned empty for ~100s after push while the runs did register (created ~60-105s post-push, all green on later query). A 20x5s poll loop hit NO_RUN_REGISTERED and the watch died as a false negative. Either registration lag exceeds the window under load or the --commit filter lags the default listing; watchers should poll longer (3-5min) and cross-check gh run list -L5 by headSha before declaring no-run.
